calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:51am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Connie Zhu, appears with Counsel, Ariel Googenheim. Respondent, Melanie Cosino, appear in Pro Per with Legal Counsultation Terrence Palas Bernardo, J.D.. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

EXHR: Group A, Trial Brief

EXHA: Group 1, Trial Brief

11:12am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Judgment Entered
